name: jjshoots/PyFlyt QuadX Waypoints
capability_target: simulation-first drone waypoint tracking pressure after hover graduation, feeding AI Grand Prix racing and recovery curricula

output_contract.target_distance: mean distance to active waypoint target
output_contract.residuals: waypoint, racing-line, recovery, and obstacle handling failure clusters

contamination_policy: Treat public simulator tasks as calibration until private tracks, held-out seeds, and race-specific course variants are generated.
regression_policy: If mastered, demote to regression suite and preserve waypoint/racing/recovery failures in residual escrow.

permission_envelope.memory: benchmark-local metadata, target-delta traces, and task context only
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, sandboxes, and report writers
permission_envelope.network: forbidden during scoring; catalog import only through license-gated source tools

teacher_role: Only diagnose adapter/source bugs or architecture walls after local learner evidence; do not score or solve benchmark items.
